title: desmodium elegans subsp. stenophyllum
intro: Desmodium elegans subsp. stenophyllum, commonly known as slender tick clover or slender ticktrefoil, is a perennial legume native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Desmodium elegans subsp. stenophyllum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
